items.titolo: Intel released its first Pentium chip on this day 33 years ago, came packing 3.1 million transistors — fifth-gen x86 chip built on an 800nm process
items.descrizione: 33 years ago today, the Pentium lineage began, shaping decades of personal computing to come.

items.titolo: Microsoft promises major improvements to Windows 11 performance, reliability, and updates — lower RAM usage, fewer Copilot interactions, and enhanced File Explorer incoming
items.descrizione: Microsoft promises serious improvements to Windows 11 performance, reliability, and updates

items.titolo: YouTube killed my comment alerts, so I vibe-coded a fix to get them back - in just 1 hour
items.descrizione: With Gemini and a simple Python script, I rebuilt YouTube email alerts. Now I won't miss another comment. Here's how you can do the same.

items.titolo: 10 prompt riutilizzabili per ottenere il massimo da Claude
items.descrizione: Ecco la raccolta di prompt riutilizzabili da usare con Claude per la ricerca, la revisione dei testi e il supporto decisionale. The post 10 prompt riutilizzabili per ottenere il massimo da Claude appeared first on Punto
